idea-plugin.name: TTR Modeler
idea-plugin.description: Editor tooling for the TTR (Tatrman) modeling language: syntax highlighting, diagnostics, go-to-definition, find-usages, hover, completion, and rename for .ttr and .ttrg files. Powered by the shared TTR language server through LSP4IJ, which is required and installed alongside this plugin. Requires Node.js 20+ on your PATH (or set the path in Settings → Languages & Frameworks → TTR Modeler).
